risk_if_not_implemented: Without Backup Access, unauthorized users may gain access to systems or data, increasing risk of data breaches and insider threats.

compensating_control_1.name: Alternate Storage Site
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to establish an alternate storage site that includes both the assets and necessary agreements to permit the storage and recovery of system backup information.
compensating_control_1.justification: Alternate Storage Site (BCD-08) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Backup Access (BCD-11.9) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the data-handling focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Backup & Restoration Hardware Protection
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to protect backup and restoration hardware and software.
compensating_control_2.justification: Backup & Restoration Hardware Protection (BCD-13) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Backup Access (BCD-11.9) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the data-handling focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
